source: Exact oracle values: authored self-computed (M13), then verified value-for-value against the REAL RMC.BestFit MaximumLikelihood by tools/verify_oracles.py (M14 -- every literal reproduces bit-for-bit from the C# library, so these ARE C#-oracle values). Exercises the `point_process` model type: DataFrame/AMS cascade with explicit threshold/total_years; single-GEV competing-risks mark distribution. rel 1e-8 (one order looser than the 1e-9 deterministic tier: the GEV point-process likelihood surface is flat enough that cross-platform libm ULP differences can shift the long NelderMead trajectory more than a Normal fit's).
